---
name: Feature Request / New Script
about: Suggest a new Frida script or lesson topic
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What Would You Like Added?
Describe the script, hook, or lesson topic you'd like to see.

## Which Pinning Implementation Does It Target?
- [ ] OkHttp3 CertificatePinner
- [ ] TrustManager (javax.net.ssl)
- [ ] Network Security Config
- [ ] Conscrypt
- [ ] Other: ___

## Why Is It Useful?
Explain the educational value.

## Do You Want to Implement It Yourself?
- [ ] Yes, I'll submit a PR
- [ ] No, I'm requesting it from maintainers
